# GitHub repository “About” (manual setup)

GitHub does **not** read this file automatically. Open **repo → ⚙ Settings → General**, then fill **Description**, **Website**, and **Topics** (or use the gear icon on the repo home **About** box).

## Suggested (English)

| Field | Paste this |
|-------|------------|
| **Description** | Small interpreted language with static types, ADTs, `import`, tree interpreter + optional bytecode VM. CLI: `sym`. |
| **Website** | `https://andoop.github.io/sym/` (GitHub Pages from `/docs`; enable in Settings → Pages) |
| **Topics** | `sym`, `programming-language`, `interpreter`, `compiler`, `rust`, `bytecode`, `typechecker`, `cli` |

## 建议（中文维护者）

| 项 | 可填写内容 |
|----|------------|
| **描述** | 带静态类型与 ADT 的小型解释型语言，支持多文件 import、树遍历解释器与可选字节码 VM，命令行工具 `sym`。 |
| **网站** | `https://andoop.github.io/sym/`（需在仓库 Settings → Pages 启用 **main** + **/docs**） |
| **主题标签** | 同上英文 topics（GitHub 标签一般为英文） |

## Quick steps

1. Open <https://github.com/andoop/sym/settings> (need admin).
2. Under **General**, set **Description** and **Website**.
3. On the repo main page, click **⚙** next to **About** → add **Topics** from the list above.
